mapper.select: SELECT dp.id AS placeId, dc.short_name AS comShortName, dc.full_name AS comFullName, dp.code AS placeCode, dp.run, dp.`open`, dp.old_version, dp.used, COALESCE(dp.url, '#') AS url, dp.short_name AS placeShortName FROM dain_place dp JOIN dain_company dc ON dc.id = dp.company_id WHERE dp.used = true AND code != 'management' ORDER BY dp.short_name
SELECT code FROM dain_logger WHERE place_id = #{placeId} AND used = true ORDER BY code ASC

SELECT dl.id AS loggerId, dl.place_id, dl.code AS loggerCode, dl.name AS loggerName, dl.cdma_no, dl.install_dt, dl.uploaded_at, dc.id AS pcId, dc.name AS pcName FROM dain_logger dl JOIN dain_computer dc ON dc.id = dl.computer_id WHERE dl.code = #{loggerCode} AND dl.used = true
mapper.update: UPDATE dain_logger SET name = #{params.name}, install_dt = #{params.install_dt}, cdma_no = #{params.cdma_no}, computer_id = #{params.computer_id} WHERE code = #{params.code}
UPDATE dain_place SET open = #{params.open} WHERE id = #{params.id};
mapper.select: SELECT dp.short_name AS '현장명', dl.name AS '구분명', dl.code AS '로거명', dl.cdma_no AS 'CDMA NO', dl.install_dt AS '최초측정일', dc.name AS '수집 PC', CASE WHEN dl.used = true THEN '운영' ELSE '종료' END AS '운영상태' FROM dain_logger dl JOIN dain_place dp ON dp.id = dl.place_id JOIN dain_computer dc ON dc.id = dl.computer_id ORDER BY dl.used DESC, dp.short_name, dl.code
